name: igorlourenco-y2k-aesthetic
description: Y2K skeuomorphic / AmpCore aesthetic skill for building glossy, holdable, neon-on-black frontends.

plugins.name: y2k-aesthetic
plugins.description: Build frontends with the Y2K skeuomorphic / AmpCore aesthetic: glossy metallic surfaces, Winamp-era skins, blobject shapes, NURBS-like radials, and neon-on-black palettes.
